## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Sam Fort (DFJ Growth) to discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing platform and potential investment opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has developed an AI-powered platform for scalable, high-quality content creation, combining expert workflows, AI agents, and human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [The company is experiencing rapid growth, projecting $12-15M revenue by year-end, with notable clients like SentinelOne, Okta, and Udemy](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [GrowthX is preparing for a Series B funding round in September, seeking strategic partners who understand their unique model](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Background and Evolution

  - [Marcel Santilli's career progression: IBM → HP → HashiCorp/Scale.ai → DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Developed content marketing strategies focused on becoming a "publication first"](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Transitioned from workshops to full-service offering, then to building an AI-powered platform](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Bootstrapped to $1.5M revenue while still CMO at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Raised Series A funding; now projecting $12-15M revenue by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [Three-layer approach: service, workflow engine, and expert layer](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Workflow engine: AI-powered, code-based pipelines for complex content processes](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Expert layer: Human-in-the-loop system for quality control and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Key features: Context engineering, fact-checking, illustration generation](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Focused on content marketing, but applicable to other domains (e.g., hiring)](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Market Positioning and Competitive Landscape

  - [Targeting companies struggling with traditional agency models or in-house content creation](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Often replacing or supplementing existing agencies](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Minimal direct competition in AI-powered content creation space](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Differentiated from general-purpose AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT) by domain expertise and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

### Team and Funding

  - [70-person team, including 30 in delivery functions](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Notable hires from Stripe, Airbnb, HashiCorp, Coinbase, and Grammarly](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Preparing for Series B funding round in September](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Seeking strategic partners who understand the business model](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [DFJ Growth to consider potential portfolio companies that could benefit from GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Marcel to keep DFJ Growth updated on fundraising plans for potential Series B participation](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Both parties to stay in touch for future discussions and potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/C5-7eqExZKpR-uispjEZhdxtXYrUweQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
